content: New Listings This Week on Salvex. Explore this week's latest bulk deals now available. Perfect opportunities for buyers looking for high-volume inventory at competitive prices.

ACIA Aero Leasing announced today the delivery of its third ATR 72-600 passenger aircraft on lease to PNG Air, Papua New Guinea's leading domestic airline. We are delighted to partner with PNG Air in expanding its fleet, having now delivered three ATR72-600s. PNG Air plays a critical role in providing regional connectivity and essential domestic services across Papua New Guinea.

company: The Middle East and North Africa Business Aviation Association
content: Aircraft Leasing & Finance. With over 28,000 aircraft in service worldwide, leasing plays a critical role in aviation finance. Airlines, lessors, and investors must strategically navigate funding, risk, and regulatory frameworks to optimize their fleets. Join our Aircraft/Aviation Finance & Leasing course to master: Aircraft leasing structures & major lessors, Aviation finance regulations & funding sources, Airline credit risk & investment strategies, Lease vs. buy decision-making for airlines & lessors. Instructor: Hazik Mohamed, Ph.D. Starts: March 7, 2026

position: Aircrafts parts/consumables sales | Technical publication Team lead
content: New on Inventory. Contact us for aircraft parts and consumables. B727, PW Engine, Pratt & Whitney engines available.

Featured Empty Leg: Abbotsford → Las Vegas | March 6. Flexible routing from anywhere in the Vancouver Region. We have a private jet repositioning from the Vancouver region to Las Vegas on March 6 — and the full aircraft is available at empty leg pricing. This is a rare opportunity to secure one-way private travel at a significantly reduced rate. If this route aligns with your plans, our team can provide aircraft details and pricing immediately.
